name: USB Mass Data Copy
description: Detects large amounts of data being copied to USB devices
query:
// USB Data Exfiltration
// Large data transfer to removable media
events from endpoint
where destination_path contains "USB" or destination_drive_type = "removable"
  and event_type in ("file_copy", "file_create")
group by hostname, username
having sum(file_size) > 100000000 or count(*) > 100
within 300 seconds
